final:
// // This comment suggests that the clock gating circuit will only propagate the clock signal when either EN or TE is inactive.
module top_module(
  input CLK,
  input EN,
  input TE,
  input D,
  output reg ENCLK
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (EN && TE) begin
      ENCLK <= D;
    end
  end

endmodule
